title: codereview-P4: has_decoded/has_encrypted var names could be more specific
description: In lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:817 after edit, bool names are ok but per C style in file (e.g. has_from), could be has_mesh_decoded and has_mesh_encrypted for clarity in context of MeshPacket oneof. P4 readability. Fix by renaming.
